---
title: "Methods modeling & analysis (frequentist)"
author: "Cob Staines"
output: html_document
---

# load data
```{r include=FALSE}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, here, yaml, lme4, lmerTest, emmeans, MASS, glmmTMB, DHARMa)

run_dir_methods = here("16S_sequence_processing", "runs", "methods_2026-03-13")

model_dir = here("analysis", "methods", "output", "models")

# read in config files
config_12s = read_yaml(here(run_dir_methods, "12S", "output", "metadata", "config.yml"))
config_16s = read_yaml(here(run_dir_methods, "16S", "output", "metadata", "config.yml"))

data_combined = read.csv(here(run_dir_methods, "12S", "output", paste0(config_12s$run$name, "_08_asv_controlled_joined.csv")))
```

# aggregate ASV counts
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# summary stats for samples (ignoring controls)
sample_taxa_count = data_combined %>%
  # drop all controls
  filter(is.na(control_type)) %>%
  group_by(sample_id,
           gene,
           filter_size_um_rz,
           passive_active_rz,
           crispr,
           block,
           extraction_type,
           control_type) %>%
  summarize(
    # number of ASVs (before controls)
    n_asv = sum(detected),
    # number of ASVs (after controls)
    n_asv_controlled = sum(detected_controlled, na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified
    n_asv_controlled_class = sum(detected_controlled & !is.na(taxonomic_rank), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified chordata
    n_asv_controlled_class_chord = sum(detected_controlled & (phylum == "Chordata"), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians
    n_asv_controlled_class_xamph = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia"), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians to the species level
    n_asv_controlled_class_xamph_spp = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia") & (taxonomic_rank == "species"), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

# pivot longer for plotting
sample_taxa_count_long = sample_taxa_count %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_asv,
                        n_asv_controlled,
                        n_asv_controlled_class,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_chord,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_xamph,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_xamph_spp),
               names_to = "count_type",
               values_to = "n")

# gene
ggplot(sample_taxa_count_long, aes(x = gene, y = n, color = count_type)) +
  geom_boxplot()

# 16s pore size active passive
ggplot(sample_taxa_count %>%
         filter(gene == "16S"), aes(x = passive_active_rz, y = n_asv_controlled_class_xamph_spp, color = filter_size_um_rz)) +
  geom_boxplot()

```

# aggregate ASV reads
```{r}
# summary stats for samples (including controls)
sample_read_count = data_combined %>%
  # drop all controls
  filter(is.na(control_type)) %>%
  group_by(sample_id,
           gene,
           filter_size_um_rz,
           passive_active_rz,
           crispr,
           block,
           extraction_type,
           control_type) %>%
  summarize(
    # number of reads
    n_reads = sum(asv_count),
    # number of reads classified
    n_reads_class = sum(if_else(!is.na(taxonomic_rank), asv_count, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of reads classified chordata
    n_reads_class_chord = sum(if_else(phylum == "Chordata", asv_count, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of reads classified as amphibians
    n_reads_class_chord_amph = sum(if_else(class == "Amphibia", asv_count, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # controlled number of reads classified as amphibians
    n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl = sum(if_else(class == "Amphibia", asv_count_controlled, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of reads classified as amphibians to the species level
    n_reads_class_chord_amph_spp = sum(if_else((class == "Amphibia") & (taxonomic_rank == "species"), asv_count, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # controlled number of reads classified as amphibians to the species level
    n_reads_class_chord_amph_spp_ctrl = sum(if_else((class == "Amphibia") & (taxonomic_rank == "species"), asv_count_controlled, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    # number of reads classified as human
    n_reads_class_chord_sapien = sum(if_else((species == "sapiens"), asv_count, 0L), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(detected_amph_ctrl = as.integer(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0),
         detected_sapien = as.integer(n_reads_class_chord_sapien > 0))

# pivot longer for plotting
sample_read_count_long = sample_read_count %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_reads,
                        n_reads_class,
                        n_reads_class_chord,
                        n_reads_class_chord_amph,
                        n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl,
                        n_reads_class_chord_amph_spp,
                        n_reads_class_chord_amph_spp_ctrl,
                        n_reads_class_chord_sapien),
               names_to = "count_type",
               values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(log10_n = log10(n + 1))

# samples
sample_read_count_summary = sample_read_count %>%
  group_by(gene, crispr, block) %>%
  count()

# gene
ggplot(sample_read_count_long, aes(x = gene, y = log10_n, color = count_type)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```
# examine data

```{r}

sample_read_count %>%
  filter(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0) %>%
  pull(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl) %>%
  log() %>%
  hist()

sample_read_count %>%
  filter(n_reads_class_chord_sapien > 0) %>%
  pull(n_reads_class_chord_sapien) %>%
  log() %>%
  hist()

```


# modeling
## model fitting

```{r include=FALSE}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# PRIMARY APPROACH: glmmTMB (hurdle negative-binomial, matches brms family)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------

# model 1 -- amphibians
m1_nb_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m1_nb_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fnb_read_amph.rds"))
m1_nb_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fnb_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens
m1_nb_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m1_nb_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))
m1_nb_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 1 -- amphibians --gaussian
m1_ga_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl + 1) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m1_ga_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fga_read_amph.rds"))
m1_ga_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fga_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens -- gaussian
m1_ga_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_sapien + 1) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m1_ga_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))
m1_ga_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 1 -- amphibians - poisson
m1_po_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = compois(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m1_po_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fpo_read_amph.rds"))
m1_po_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fpo_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens -- poisson
m1_po_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = compois(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m1_po_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m1_fpo_read_sapiens.rds"))
m1_po_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m1_fpo_read_sapiens.rds"))


# model 2 — amphibians
m2_nb_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2_nb_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnb_read_amph.rds"))
m2_nb_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnb_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens
m2_nb_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2_nb_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))
m2_nb_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 2 — amphibians -- offset
m2_nbo_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block + offset(log_lib_size),
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2_nbo_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnbo_read_amph.rds"))
m2_nbo_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnbo_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens -- offset
m2_nbo_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block + offset(log_lib_size),
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2_nbo_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnbo_read_sapiens.rds"))
m2_nbo_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fnbo_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 2 — amphibians -- gaussian
m2_ga_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl + 1) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m2_ga_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fga_read_amph.rds"))
m2_ga_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fga_read_amph.rds"))

# model 2 — sapiens
m2_ga_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_sapien + 1) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m2_ga_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m2_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))
m2_ga_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 2b — dispersion submodel (approximation: model dispersion ~ group via
# glmmTMB's dispformula; not a direct analogue to brms shape ~ submodel but
# is the closest frequentist equivalent)
m2b_nb_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula      = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula    = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  dispformula  = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data         = sample_read_count,
  family       = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2b_nb_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m2b_fnb_read_amph.rds"))
m2b_nb_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2b_fnb_read_amph.rds"))

m2b_nb_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula      = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  ziformula    = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  dispformula  = ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data         = sample_read_count,
  family       = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m2b_nb_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m2b_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))
m2b_nb_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m2b_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 3 — full 3-way interactions
m3_nb_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene * crispr * block,
  ziformula = ~ gene * crispr * block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m3_nb_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m3_fnb_read_amph.rds"))
m3_nb_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m3_fnb_read_amph.rds"))

m3_nb_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene * crispr * block,
  ziformula = ~ gene * crispr * block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = nbinom2(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m3_nb_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m3_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))
m3_nb_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m3_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 3 — full 3-way interactions -- gaussian
m3_ga_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl + 1) ~ gene * crispr * block,
  ziformula = ~ gene * crispr * block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m3_ga_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m3_fga_read_amph.rds"))
m3_ga_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m3_fga_read_amph.rds"))

m3_ga_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_sapien + 1) ~ gene * crispr * block,
  ziformula = ~ gene * crispr * block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m3_ga_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m3_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))
m3_ga_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m3_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))


# model 4 — full 3-way interactions -- detection binomial
m4_bi_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = detected_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = binomial(link = "logit")
)

saveRDS(m4_bi_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fbi_read_amph.rds"))
m4_bi_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fbi_read_amph.rds"))

m4_bi_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = detected_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count,
  family    = binomial(link = "logit")
)

saveRDS(m4_bi_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fbi_read_sapiens.rds"))
m4_bi_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fbi_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 4 — positive only-- reads gaussian
m4_ga_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count %>% filter(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0),
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m4_ga_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fga_read_amph.rds"))
m4_ga_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fga_read_amph.rds"))

m4_ga_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = log(n_reads_class_chord_sapien) ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  data      = sample_read_count %>% filter(n_reads_class_chord_sapien > 0),
  family    = gaussian()
)

saveRDS(m4_ga_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))
m4_ga_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fga_read_sapiens.rds"))

# model 4 — positive only-- reads nb
m4_nb_read_amph <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  dispformula = ~ block + gene,
  data      = sample_read_count %>% filter(n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0),
  family    = lognormal(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m4_nb_read_amph, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fnb_read_amph.rds"))
m4_nb_read_amph = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fnb_read_amph.rds"))

m4_nb_read_sapiens <- glmmTMB(
  formula   = n_reads_class_chord_sapien ~ gene:crispr + gene:block,
  dispformula = ~ block,
  data      = sample_read_count %>% filter(n_reads_class_chord_sapien > 0),
  family    = lognormal(link = "log")
)

saveRDS(m4_nb_read_sapiens, file = here(model_dir, "m4_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))
m4_nb_read_sapiens = readRDS(file = here(model_dir, "m4_fnb_read_sapiens.rds"))

```

## model comparison
```{r}
# AIC-based model comparison (analogous to LOO-IC comparison in brms)
# Lower AIC = better out-of-sample predictive fit
(aic_comp_amph = AIC(m1_nb_read_amph,
                     m1_ga_read_amph,
                     # m1_po_read_amph,
                     m2_nb_read_amph,
                     m2_nbo_read_amph,
                     m2b_nb_read_amph,
                     m2_ga_read_amph,
                     m3_nb_read_amph,
                     # m3_ga_read_amph,
                     m4_bi_read_amph,
                     m4_ga_read_amph,
                     m4_nb_read_amph))

(aic_comp_sapiens = AIC(m1_nb_read_sapiens,
                        m1_ga_read_sapiens,
                        # m1_po_read_sapiens,
                        m2_nb_read_sapiens,
                        m2_nbo_read_sapiens,
                        m2b_nb_read_sapiens,
                        m2_ga_read_sapiens,
                        m3_nb_read_sapiens,
                        # m3_ga_read_sapiens,
                        m4_bi_read_sapiens,
                        m4_ga_read_sapiens,
                        m4_nb_read_sapiens))

```

## model checks
```{r}
# Posterior predictive checks are a Bayesian concept; the frequentist
# equivalent is residual diagnostics and simulation-based checks.
# DHARMa provides standardized residuals for GLMMs.

sim_bi_amph    = simulateResiduals(m4_bi_read_amph,    n = 1000)
sim_bi_sapiens = simulateResiduals(m4_bi_read_sapiens, n = 1000)
sim_amph    = simulateResiduals(m4_nb_read_amph,    n = 1000)
sim_sapiens = simulateResiduals(m4_ga_read_sapiens, n = 1000)

plot(sim_bi_amph)
plot(sim_bi_sapiens)

plot(sim_amph)
plot(sim_sapiens)

# check if deviation is driven by specific covariate combinations
plotResiduals(sim_amph, sample_read_count$gene[sample_read_count$n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0])
plotResiduals(sim_amph, sample_read_count$crispr[sample_read_count$n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0])
plotResiduals(sim_amph, sample_read_count$block[sample_read_count$n_reads_class_chord_amph_ctrl > 0])

# check residuals vs fitted (heteroscedasticity)
plotResiduals(sim_amph, predict(m4_ga_read_amph))
plotResiduals(sim_sapiens, predict(m4_ga_read_sapiens))

# Test for overdispersion and zero inflation
testDispersion(sim_amph)
# testZeroInflation(sim_amph)

testDispersion(sim_sapiens)
# testZeroInflation(sim_sapiens)
```

# model interpretation
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
summary(m4_nb_read_amph)
summary(m4_ga_read_sapiens)
```

# predicted marginal means and contrasts
## setup: newdata grid
```{r include=FALSE}
model_select_amph    = m2b_nb_read_amph
model_select_sapiens = m2b_nb_read_sapiens

nd_crblk = expand_grid(
  crispr = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  block  = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  gene   = c("12S", "16S")
)
```

## amphibians
```{r include=FALSE}
# --- Detection component (zi = zero-inflation ~ hu in brms) ---
# emmeans on the zi component returns predictions on the logit scale,
# matching the brms hu parameter (log-odds of structural zero).
# NOTE: glmmTMB's zi models P(zero), so contrast direction is:
#   zi_contrast > 0 means MORE zeros (LESS detection) for TRUE vs FALSE.
#   To match brms convention (hu = P(zero), p_detect = 1 - plogis(hu)),
#   negate contrasts where appropriate (see plots below).

em_zi_amph = emmeans(model_select_amph,
                     ~ gene | crispr:block,
                     component = "zi",
                     type      = "link")  # logit scale

em_mu_amph = emmeans(model_select_amph,
                     ~ gene | crispr:block,
                     component = "cond",
                     type      = "link")  # log scale

# --- Tidy predictions for plotting ---

# detection
zi_crblk_draws_a = as.data.frame(em_zi_amph) %>%
  left_join(nd_crblk, by = c("gene", "crispr", "block")) %>%
  mutate(p_detect = 1 - plogis(emmean))   # P(detection)

# counts
mu_crblk_draws_a = as.data.frame(em_mu_amph) %>%
  left_join(nd_crblk, by = c("gene", "crispr", "block")) %>%
  rename(mu = emmean)

# --- Contrasts ---

## crispr
zi_cr_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ crispr | gene:block,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"   # TRUE - FALSE
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "cr_TRUE - cr_FALSE")

mu_cr_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ crispr | gene:block,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "cr_TRUE - cr_FALSE")

## block
zi_blk_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ block | gene:crispr,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "blk_TRUE - blk_FALSE")

mu_blk_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ block | gene:crispr,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "blk_TRUE - blk_FALSE")

## gene
zi_gene_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ gene | crispr:block,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"   # 16S - 12S
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "g_16S - g_12S")

mu_gene_contrast_a = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_amph, ~ gene | crispr:block,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "g_16S - g_12S")

```

## Homo sapiens
```{r}
em_zi_sapiens = emmeans(model_select_sapiens,
                        ~ gene | crispr:block,
                        component = "zi",
                        type      = "link")

em_mu_sapiens = emmeans(model_select_sapiens,
                        ~ gene | crispr:block,
                        component = "cond",
                        type      = "link")

# detection
zi_crblk_draws_s = as.data.frame(em_zi_sapiens) %>%
  left_join(nd_crblk, by = c("gene", "crispr", "block")) %>%
  mutate(p_detect = 1 - plogis(emmean))

# counts
mu_crblk_draws_s = as.data.frame(em_mu_sapiens) %>%
  left_join(nd_crblk, by = c("gene", "crispr", "block")) %>%
  rename(mu = emmean)

## crispr
zi_cr_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ crispr | gene:block,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "cr_TRUE - cr_FALSE")

mu_cr_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ crispr | gene:block,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "cr_TRUE - cr_FALSE")

## block
zi_blk_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ block | gene:crispr,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "blk_TRUE - blk_FALSE")

mu_blk_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ block | gene:crispr,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "blk_TRUE - blk_FALSE")

## gene
zi_gene_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ gene | crispr:block,
          component = "zi", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(zi_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "g_16S - g_12S")

mu_gene_contrast_s = contrast(
  emmeans(model_select_sapiens, ~ gene | crispr:block,
          component = "cond", type = "link"),
  method = "revpairwise"
) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rename(mu_contrast = estimate) %>%
  mutate(contrast = "g_16S - g_12S")

```

# hypothesis testing

## 12S – CRISPR
```{r}

# --- detection ---
zi_12s_crispr = bind_rows(
  zi_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "12S", !block)

ggplot(zi_12s_crispr, aes(y = p_detect, x = crispr)) +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 1 - plogis(emmean + 1.96 * SE),
                    ymax = 1 - plogis(emmean - 1.96 * SE)),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("taxon") +
  labs(title = "12S Detection",
       x = "CRISPR",
       y = "Probability of detection [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## contrast
zi_12s_crispr_contrast = bind_rows(
  zi_cr_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_cr_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "12S",
         block != TRUE)

# NOTE: zi_contrast > 0 means more zeros (less detection) for CRISPR TRUE.
# Negating to align with brms convention: positive value = more detection.
ggplot(zi_12s_crispr_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("taxon", scales = "free") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "12S Detection: CRISPR Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(odds of detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

# --- read counts ---
mu_12s_crispr = bind_rows(
  mu_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "12S", !block)

ggplot(mu_12s_crispr, aes(y = mu, x = crispr)) +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mu - 1.96 * SE, ymax = mu + 1.96 * SE),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("taxon") +
  labs(title = "12S Read Count",
       x = "CRISPR",
       y = "log(read count) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## contrast
mu_12s_crispr_contrast = bind_rows(
  mu_cr_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_cr_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "12S",
         block != TRUE)

ggplot(mu_12s_crispr_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("taxon", scales = "free") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "12S Read Count: CRISPR Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(read count) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

```

## 16S – Block – CRISPR
```{r}

# --- detection ---
zi_16s_crblk = bind_rows(
  zi_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(crispr = paste0("CRISPR ", as.character(crispr)),
         block  = paste0("Block ", as.character(block)))

ggplot(zi_16s_crblk, aes(y = p_detect, x = taxon)) +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 1 - plogis(emmean + 1.96 * SE),
                    ymax = 1 - plogis(emmean - 1.96 * SE)),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(crispr ~ block) +
  labs(title = "16S Detection",
       x = "Taxon",
       y = "Probability of detection [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## crispr contrast
zi_16s_crispr_contrast = bind_rows(
  zi_cr_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_cr_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(block = paste0("Block ", as.character(block)))

ggplot(zi_16s_crispr_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  ylim(-15, 15) +
  facet_grid(taxon ~ block) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "16S Detection: CRISPR Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(odds of detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## block contrast
zi_16s_block_contrast = bind_rows(
  zi_blk_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_blk_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(crispr = paste0("CRISPR ", as.character(crispr)))

ggplot(zi_16s_block_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_grid(taxon ~ crispr) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "16S Detection: Block Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(odds of detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

# --- read counts ---
mu_16s_crblk = bind_rows(
  mu_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(crispr = paste0("CRISPR ", as.character(crispr)),
         block  = paste0("Block ", as.character(block)))

ggplot(mu_16s_crblk, aes(y = mu, x = taxon)) +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mu - 1.96 * SE, ymax = mu + 1.96 * SE),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(crispr ~ block) +
  labs(title = "16S Read Counts",
       x = "Taxon",
       y = "log(read counts after detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## crispr contrast
mu_16s_crispr_contrast = bind_rows(
  mu_cr_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_cr_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(block = paste0("Block ", as.character(block)))

ggplot(mu_16s_crispr_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_grid(taxon ~ block) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "16S Read Counts: CRISPR Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(read counts) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

## block contrast
mu_16s_block_contrast = bind_rows(
  mu_blk_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_blk_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(gene == "16S") %>%
  mutate(crispr = paste0("CRISPR ", as.character(crispr)))

ggplot(mu_16s_block_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_grid(taxon ~ crispr) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "16S Read Counts: Block Contrast (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(read counts) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

```

## Gene effect
```{r}

# --- detection ---
zi_gene = bind_rows(
  zi_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(!crispr, !block)

ggplot(zi_gene, aes(y = p_detect, x = gene)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#66c2a5") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 1 - plogis(emmean + 1.96 * SE),
                    ymax = 1 - plogis(emmean - 1.96 * SE)),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("taxon") +
  labs(title = "Detection by Gene",
       x = "Gene",
       y = "Probability of detection [-]\nwith 95% CI")

zi_gene_contrast = bind_rows(
  zi_gene_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  zi_gene_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(!crispr, !block)

ggplot(zi_gene_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("taxon", scales = "free") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Detection by Gene: 16S - 12S",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(odds of detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

# --- read counts ---
mu_gene = bind_rows(
  mu_crblk_draws_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_crblk_draws_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(!crispr, !block)

ggplot(mu_gene, aes(y = mu, x = gene)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8da0cb") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mu - 1.96 * SE, ymax = mu + 1.96 * SE),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("taxon") +
  labs(title = "Read Count after Detection by Gene",
       x = "Gene",
       y = "log(read count after detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

mu_gene_contrast = bind_rows(
  mu_gene_contrast_a %>% mutate(taxon = "Amphibia"),
  mu_gene_contrast_s %>% mutate(taxon = "Homo sapiens")
) %>%
  filter(!crispr, !block)

ggplot(mu_gene_contrast,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("taxon", scales = "free") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Read Count after Detection by Gene: 16S - 12S",
       x = "",
       y = "Contrast of log(read count after detection) [-]\nwith 95% CI")

```

# visualize amphibians
```{r}
# detection distributions
ggplot(zi_crblk_draws_a, aes(y = p_detect, x = crispr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#66c2a5") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 1 - plogis(emmean + 1.96 * SE),
                    ymax = 1 - plogis(emmean - 1.96 * SE)),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  labs(title = "Amphibian Detection by CRISPR",
       x = "CRISPR", y = "P(detection) with 95% CI")

# crispr contrast on detection
ggplot(zi_cr_contrast_a,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CRISPR effect on amphibian detection (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Probability of detection (logit scale) [-]")

# read count distributions
ggplot(mu_crblk_draws_a, aes(y = mu, x = crispr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8da0cb") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mu - 1.96 * SE, ymax = mu + 1.96 * SE),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  labs(title = "Amphibian Read Counts by CRISPR",
       x = "CRISPR", y = "log(reads) with 95% CI")

# crispr contrast on read counts
ggplot(mu_cr_contrast_a,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CRISPR effect on amphibian reads (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Number of reads (log scale) [-]")

# block contrast on detection
ggplot(zi_blk_contrast_a,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "block effect on amphibian detection (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Probability of detection (logit scale) [-]")

# block contrast on read counts
ggplot(mu_blk_contrast_a,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "block effect on amphibian reads (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Number of reads (log scale) [-]")

```

# visualize humans
```{r}
# detection distributions
ggplot(zi_crblk_draws_s, aes(y = p_detect, x = crispr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#66c2a5") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 1 - plogis(emmean + 1.96 * SE),
                    ymax = 1 - plogis(emmean - 1.96 * SE)),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  labs(title = "Human Detection by CRISPR",
       x = "CRISPR", y = "P(detection) with 95% CI")

# crispr contrast on detection
ggplot(zi_cr_contrast_s,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CRISPR effect on human detection (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Probability of detection (logit scale) [-]")

# read count distributions
ggplot(mu_crblk_draws_s, aes(y = mu, x = crispr)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8da0cb") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mu - 1.96 * SE, ymax = mu + 1.96 * SE),
                width = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  labs(title = "Human Read Counts by CRISPR",
       x = "CRISPR", y = "log(reads) with 95% CI")

# crispr contrast on read counts
ggplot(mu_cr_contrast_s,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CRISPR effect on human reads (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Number of reads (log scale) [-]")

# block contrast on detection
ggplot(zi_blk_contrast_s,
       aes(x = contrast, y = -zi_contrast,
           ymin = -zi_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = -zi_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#66c2a5") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "block effect on human detection (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Probability of detection (logit scale) [-]")

# block contrast on read counts
ggplot(mu_blk_contrast_s,
       aes(x = contrast, y = mu_contrast,
           ymin = mu_contrast - 1.96 * SE,
           ymax = mu_contrast + 1.96 * SE)) +
  geom_pointrange(color = "#8da0cb") +
  facet_wrap("gene") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "block effect on human reads (TRUE - FALSE)",
       x = "",
       y = "Number of reads (log scale) [-]")

```
